title: fix(sdk): add 402 insufficient balance to non-retriable errors
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Stop hitting yourself
gist.blurb: The SDK now immediately throws 402 Insufficient Balance errors instead of stubbornly retrying them. Because when you're out of pollen, asking again won't magically make more appear!
gist.summary: Added 402 (Insufficient Balance) to the list of non-retriable error codes in the SDK to prevent unnecessary API calls.
gist.impact: Developers will see immediate error feedback when out of credits instead of waiting for retries to exhaust.
gist.visual_concept: A chunky robot trying to press a retry button while getting a 402 error, and Polly the bee gently stopping it with a tiny stop sign. Represents stopping unnecessary retries.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head showing a '402' error, while the cute bee mascot gently holds up a tiny red stop sign to prevent the robot from pressing a retry button. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head showing a '402' error, while the cute bee mascot gently holds up a tiny red stop sign to prevent the robot from pressing a retry button. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
